entity.label: Jehiel
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: One of the Levites of the family of Heman who assisted Hezekiah in his work of reformation (2 Chr. 29:14).

nodes.label: Jehiel
nodes.description: One of the Levites of the family of Heman who assisted Hezekiah in his work of reformation (2 Chr. 29:14).

verses.text: And of the sons of Heman; Jehiel, and Shimei: and of the sons of Jeduthun; Shemaiah, and Uzziel.
